# Xenos Mercenaries

#### Aeldari, Drukhari, and Harlequin Mercenaries

* 0-1 Corsair Shade Runner (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Corsair Soul Weaver (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Death Jester (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Harlequins  
* 0-2 Dragon Huntmate (Cost: 2 Glory) Exodites only  
* 0-1 Dragonling Pack (Cost: 3 Glory) Exodites only  
* 0-2 Mandrake (Cost: 4 Glory) Drukhari Only  
* 0-1 Pathfinder (Cost: 5 Glory) Aeldari Only  
* 0-1 Shadowseer (Cost: 6 Glory) Unavailable to Harlequins  
* 0-1 Shadow Spectre (Cost: 6 Glory) Aeldari (besides Corsairs and Exodites) Oonly  
* 0-1 Solitaire (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Harlequins

**Drukhari Outlaw Options**

* 0-1 Barghesi Thrall (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Barghesi Raider (Cost: 5 Glory)
